selectionRules: escalation candidates receive null ordinary scores and are excluded from ordinary averages
candidates with unresolved CP27 references or high/critical blockers remain held
private_blocked release state remains blocked from public use
public-safe candidate count must remain zero

regressionBaseline.note: CP24 fixtures are regression labels only. CP28-R02 collects candidates from CP27 snapshot-backed graph indexes.

scoringComponents.explanation: Candidate has source references available for private reviewer navigation.
Candidate has canonical reference handles available for traceability.
Candidate has bounded graph-neighbor metadata for retrieval expansion review.
Candidate has bounded vault pack references for internal inspection.
Candidate carries private reviewed quality metadata.
Candidate remains blocked from public release.
CP27 refreshed graph still exposes unresolved references.
CP27 refreshed graph still exposes high or critical blockers.
Candidate remediation reasons reduce reviewer-ready rank.
Candidate remains connected to a CP24 regression fixture label.
Candidate came directly from a snapshot-backed CP27 index entry.

remediationSummary.action: Resolve CP27 graph/vault references before promoting candidates into validation handoff.
Complete private reviewer quality checks for the affected source group or node family.
Route safety-sensitive request handling through escalation workflow before retrieval use.
Repair source/provenance linkage and rerun snapshot-backed graph refresh.
Route hadith grade uncertainty to escalation review before ordinary scoring.

publicBoundary.message: CP28-R03 ranking is private operational reviewer triage only. Public release remains blocked and public-safe candidate count is zero.

warnings: CP28-R03 ranks metadata candidates only and exports no raw Quran, translation, tafsir, or hadith text bodies.
CP28-R03 ranking score is not a religious authority, authenticity, or public-release decision.
Because CP27 unresolved references and high/critical blockers remain visible, CP28-R03 selects zero final candidates.
